tasks.label: Install backend dependencies
tasks.command: PYTHON_BIN=''; if command -v python3.11 >/dev/null 2>&1; then PYTHON_BIN='python3.11'; elif command -v python3.10 >/dev/null 2>&1; then PYTHON_BIN='python3.10'; else echo 'Python 3.10+ not found. Please install Python 3.10 or 3.11 first.'; exit 1; fi; echo "Using ${PYTHON_BIN}"; rm -rf .venv; ${PYTHON_BIN} -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt
